name: research.evaluate
description: Run the full 4-phase AI research evaluation pipeline on a paper or article. Phases: Ingest → Comprehend → Evaluate → Recommend. Returns a structured verdict (ADOPT/ADAPT/DEFER/REJECT) with implementation roadmap.

source.description: URL, file path, or arXiv ID of the paper to evaluate

source_type.description: Type of source (optional, auto-detected from source string)

context_documents.description: Additional context document paths to include in evaluation

llm_model.description: LLM model to use for analysis (optional, defaults to service default)

save_to_db.description: Whether to persist evaluation results to database (default: true)

paper_id.description: Unique identifier for the evaluated paper

total_tokens_used.description: Total LLM tokens used during evaluation
